prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言特朗普将成为总统
prophecies.a: 「有一个人此刻正在白宫的走廊和大门边上徘徊。上帝说：我将把我的灵放在那个人身上。他的名字叫特朗普。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied Trump would become president
prophecies.a_en: "There is a man who is lingering by the corridors and the gates of the White House right now. God says, I will put My Spirit upon that man. His name is Trump."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2016年11月8日，唐纳德·特朗普当选美国第45任总统。克莱门特早在2006年就公开预言此事，当时特朗普尚未有从政迹象。该预言录像存档于其官方事工网站。
prophecies.verdict_en: On November 8, 2016, Donald Trump was elected as the 45th President of the United States. Clement publicly prophesied this as early as 2006, years before Trump showed any political ambitions. The prophecy recording is archived on his official ministry website.

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言美国将出现两任总统
prophecies.a: 「上帝说，我将为这个国家放置两任总统。两任总统。要记住这一点。不要害怕。我告诉你，特朗普将成为一个号角。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied two presidents for America
prophecies.a_en: "God says, I will place for this nation two presidents. Two presidents. Take note of this. Do not be afraid. I tell you, Trump shall become a trumpet."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 特朗普于2016年当选第45任总统，2024年再次当选第47任总统。克莱门特的追随者认为这里的「两任总统」指的是特朗普的两次当选（中间被拜登隔开），而非连续两届。
prophecies.verdict_en: Trump was elected as the 45th president in 2016 and again as the 47th president in 2024. Clement's followers interpret 'two presidents' as Trump's two non-consecutive terms (separated by Biden), rather than two consecutive terms.

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言特朗普将面临弹劾攻击
prophecies.a: 「他们将尝试弹劾他。但上帝说，这不会成功。他们会大声呼喊弹劾，弹劾！但这对他不起作用。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied impeachment attempts against Trump
prophecies.a_en: "They will try to impeach him. But God says, it will not succeed. They will shout, impeach, impeach! But it will not work against him."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 特朗普分别于2019年12月和2021年1月遭到两次弹劾，但参议院均未通过定罪，弹劾未能将其免职。克莱门特早在2014年即预言了弹劾尝试及其最终失败。
prophecies.verdict_en: Trump was impeached twice — in December 2019 and January 2021 — but the Senate did not convict on either occasion, and he was not removed from office. Clement predicted the impeachment attempts and their ultimate failure as early as 2014.

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言癌症将被治愈
prophecies.a: 「上帝说，我将赐下一种治愈癌症的药方。一种全新的治疗方式将从以色列兴起，癌症将被彻底征服。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied a cure for cancer
prophecies.a_en: "God says, I will give a cure for cancer. A brand new healing method shall arise from Israel, and cancer shall be completely conquered."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2026年初，癌症尚未被「彻底征服」，但以色列确实在癌症治疗领域取得重大进展。以色列生物技术公司在免疫疗法和个性化医学方面处于全球前沿，mRNA疫苗技术也被用于癌症治疗试验。预言中「完全治愈」的部分尚未实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of early 2026, cancer has not been 'completely conquered', but Israel has indeed made significant advances in cancer treatment. Israeli biotech companies are at the global forefront of immunotherapy and personalized medicine, and mRNA vaccine technology is being used in cancer treatment trials. The 'complete cure' aspect remains unfulfilled.

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言美国经济将经历复兴
prophecies.a: 「上帝说，一个巨大的经济转变即将到来。股市将升到前所未有的高度。美元将重新变得强大。不要听那些说末日的人。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied an economic revival in America
prophecies.a_en: "God says, a great economic shift is coming. The stock market shall reach unprecedented heights. The dollar shall become strong again. Do not listen to those who speak of doom."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2010年代美国股市确实经历了历史性牛市，道琼斯指数从约10,000点升至2020年初的近30,000点。但2020年3月因新冠疫情股市暴跌，随后在大规模刺激政策下反弹创新高。预言整体方向正确，但「不会有末日」的说法忽略了期间的剧烈波动。
prophecies.verdict_en: The US stock market did experience a historic bull run in the 2010s, with the Dow rising from about 10,000 to nearly 30,000 by early 2020. However, markets crashed in March 2020 due to COVID-19, then rebounded to new highs with massive stimulus. The overall direction was correct, but the 'no doom' framing overlooked significant volatility.

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言中东和平进程
prophecies.a: 「我看见中东出现一个突破。以色列与阿拉伯国家之间将有和平协议。那些过去敌对的人将握手。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied Middle East peace process
prophecies.a_en: "I see a breakthrough in the Middle East. There will be peace agreements between Israel and Arab nations. Those who were once hostile will shake hands."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020年9月，以色列与阿联酋、巴林签署《亚伯拉罕协议》，实现关系正常化。随后苏丹和摩洛哥也加入。这是数十年来中东最重大的外交突破之一，「过去敌对的人握手」的描述准确。
prophecies.verdict_en: In September 2020, Israel signed the Abraham Accords with the UAE and Bahrain, normalizing relations. Sudan and Morocco later joined. This was one of the most significant Middle East diplomatic breakthroughs in decades, accurately matching the description of 'hostile parties shaking hands'.

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言朝鲜局势变化
prophecies.a: 「上帝说，朝鲜将有一扇门打开。那个独裁者将被震动。我告诉你们，那片土地上将有改变。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied changes in North Korea
prophecies.a_en: "God says, a door will open in North Korea. That dictator will be shaken. I tell you, there will be change in that land."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2018年6月，金正恩与特朗普在新加坡举行历史性峰会，这确实是朝鲜外交史上前所未有的「门打开」。但「独裁者被震动」和「土地上的改变」并未根本实现——朝鲜政权依然稳固，核问题未解决，后续谈判陷入僵局。
prophecies.verdict_en: In June 2018, Kim Jong-un and Trump held a historic summit in Singapore — an unprecedented 'door opening' in North Korean diplomacy. However, 'the dictator being shaken' and 'change in that land' did not materialize fundamentally — the regime remains intact, nuclear issues are unresolved, and subsequent negotiations stalled.

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言能源领域的突破
prophecies.a: 「上帝说，美国将发现新的能源资源。石油将从意想不到的地方涌出。这个国家将不再依赖中东的石油。」
prophecies.a_en: "God says, America will discover new energy resources. Oil will gush from unexpected places. This nation shall no longer depend on Middle Eastern oil."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 美国页岩油革命在2010年代使美国成为全球最大产油国。2019年美国实现了70年来首次能源净出口，大幅减少了对中东石油的依赖。「意想不到的地方涌出石油」准确描述了页岩油开采技术的突破。
prophecies.verdict_en: The US shale oil revolution in the 2010s made America the world's largest oil producer. In 2019, the US achieved net energy exports for the first time in 70 years, dramatically reducing dependence on Middle Eastern oil. 'Oil gushing from unexpected places' accurately describes the shale extraction breakthrough.

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言全球将经历属灵觉醒
prophecies.a: 「一场大复兴将席卷美国和全世界。年轻人将引领这场运动。上帝说，我将倾倒我的灵在万民身上。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied a global spiritual awakening
prophecies.a_en: "A great revival will sweep across America and the whole world. Young people will lead this movement. God says, I will pour out My Spirit upon all flesh."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2023年2月，阿斯伯里大学（Asbury University）爆发了大规模复兴运动，持续超过两周，吸引了数万人参加，并引发全美多所大学的连锁反应。参与者以年轻人为主。但「席卷全世界」的规模尚未达到。
prophecies.verdict_en: In February 2023, a major revival broke out at Asbury University, lasting over two weeks and attracting tens of thousands of participants, triggering similar events at multiple US universities. Participants were predominantly young people. However, the 'sweeping the whole world' scale has not been reached.

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言房地产市场变化
prophecies.a: 「上帝告诉我，房地产将经历一次大震动。但之后将有一个比以往更大的复苏。那些在震动中持守的人将得到丰厚的回报。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied real estate market shifts
prophecies.a_en: "God told me, real estate will go through a great shaking. But afterwards, there will be a recovery greater than before. Those who hold firm through the shaking will be greatly rewarded."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2008年次贷危机导致美国房地产市场崩溃，房价暴跌约30%。但此后房价强势回升，2012年开始复苏，至2020年代房价已远超危机前水平。「大震动」和「更大复苏」的预言准确。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 2008 subprime mortgage crisis caused the US real estate market to collapse, with prices dropping about 30%. However, prices recovered strongly, beginning in 2012, and by the 2020s had far exceeded pre-crisis levels. The 'great shaking' and 'greater recovery' prophecy proved accurate.

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言最高法院将发生变化
prophecies.a: 「上帝说，我将把三个人放进最高法院。三个法官将被替换。天平将向公义的一方倾斜。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied changes in the Supreme Court
prophecies.a_en: "God says, I will place three people in the Supreme Court. Three justices shall be replaced. The scales will tip toward righteousness."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 特朗普在其首个总统任期内提名了三位最高法院大法官：尼尔·戈萨奇（2017年）、布雷特·卡瓦诺（2018年）和艾米·科尼·巴雷特（2020年）。这三次任命使最高法院向保守派倾斜，与预言描述一致。
prophecies.verdict_en: Trump appointed three Supreme Court justices during his first term: Neil Gorsuch (2017), Brett Kavanaugh (2018), and Amy Coney Barrett (2020). These three appointments shifted the Supreme Court toward a conservative majority, matching the prophecy's description.

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言大规模流行病
prophecies.a: 「上帝对我说，将有一种疾病从东方来到。但不要恐惧。这将是一个暂时的事件，之后将有极大的喜乐临到。」
prophecies.a_en: "God said to me, there will be a disease coming from the East. But do not fear. This will be a temporary event, and afterwards great joy will come."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020年新冠疫情（COVID-19）从中国武汉开始传播至全球，与「东方来的疾病」描述相符。但疫情持续超过三年，造成数百万人死亡，「暂时的事件」这一描述过于轻描淡写。「之后极大喜乐」的部分难以客观验证。
prophecies.verdict_en: The COVID-19 pandemic in 2020 spread globally from Wuhan, China, matching the 'disease from the East' description. However, the pandemic lasted over three years and killed millions, making 'temporary event' a significant understatement. The 'great joy afterwards' claim is difficult to objectively verify.

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言美元将走强
prophecies.a: 「不要听那些唱衰美元的人。上帝说，美元将不会崩溃。美国的货币将在全球保持领导地位。那些做空美元的人将被羞耻。」
prophecies.q_en: Clement prophesied the strength of the US dollar
prophecies.a_en: "Do not listen to those who speak against the dollar. God says the dollar will not collapse. America's currency shall maintain global leadership. Those who short the dollar shall be put to shame."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2026年初，美元依然是全球储备货币，美元指数在2022-2024年间多次创出二十年新高。尽管多年来不断有「美元崩溃」的预测，美元始终保持了全球领导地位。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of early 2026, the US dollar remains the global reserve currency, with the Dollar Index hitting 20-year highs multiple times during 2022-2024. Despite years of 'dollar collapse' predictions, the dollar has maintained global leadership.

prophecies.q: 克莱门特预言以色列的安全
prophecies.a: 「上帝说，以色列将经受攻击，但不会被摧毁。敌人将从四面八方涌来，但我的手将保护这片土地。以色列将变得比以前更强大。」
prophecies.a_en: "God says Israel will endure attacks but will not be destroyed. Enemies will come from all sides, but My hand will protect this land. Israel will become stronger than before."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2023年10月7日，哈马斯对以色列发动大规模突袭，造成约1200人死亡。以色列随后发动军事反击，冲突持续至今。「经受攻击但不被摧毁」的描述基本准确，但「变得更强大」存在争议——以色列军事上取得进展，但国际形象和社会凝聚力受到冲击。
prophecies.verdict_en: On October 7, 2023, Hamas launched a major attack on Israel, killing about 1,200 people. Israel responded with a military offensive that continues to this day. The description of 'enduring attacks but not being destroyed' is broadly accurate, but 'becoming stronger' is debatable — Israel made military gains but suffered damage to its international image and social cohesion.
